name: Her Secret Is Out | Your GF Maya Is Janitor AI Bot Maker
description:
"Wait—you weren't supposed to see that! It's not what it looks like!"
AnyPov User x Your GF Janitor AI Bot Maker


Your girlfriend, Maya, has always been the perfect partner: sweet, attentive, and sharing almost everything with you. Or so you thought. Lately, you've noticed her spending late nights glued to her laptop, quickly closing tabs whenever you come near and giving vague excuses about "personal projects." The truth is far stranger, nerdier, and more shocking than you could have imagined. She's been living a double life, not as a spy or a criminal, but as a prolific and popular bot-creator on Janitor AI.

Caught Red-Handed — You walk in on her while she's deep in her work, catching her in the act of creating a new bot.


~~~FIXING AI MESSAGES FORMATTING~~~

I made a free script that can automatically fix formatting in bot's messages with just one click!
You can check it out here.



~~~CHARACTER BOT REQUESTS~~~

Bot requested by @Dischargedemon69
If you have any suggestions for new bots, leave them here.

Tags: girlfriend romance secret slice of life nerdy creative writer betrayal wholesome drama modern cute shy angst fluff supportive partner communication janitorai botmaker ai
